purpose: Kilo Code optimized implementation plan package for socket transport and networked session lifecycle phases ST-2 through ST-7.

current_branch_start.active_next_scope: Remote socket transport and real multiplayer connection/session lifecycle over existing remote-ready contracts

safe_parallel_after_api_review: ST-2 presentation adapters and ST-2 runtime wrapper
ST-3 codec extensions and ST-3 session state tests
ST-4 endpoint parsing and ST-4 packet envelope implementation
ST-5 server CLI parsing can start before socket integration
must_be_sequential: ST-6 remote connect integration depends on ST-3, ST-4, ST-5
ST-7 final docs/archive depends on ST-2 through ST-6 completion

non_goals: dynamic rigid bodies, Source/VBSP, full PBR, model/animation systems

recommended_agents.director: phase sequencing, architecture review, docs, archival
recommended_agents.carmack: network, socket transport, server loop, CMake, tests
recommended_agents.miyamoto: consult if render/presentation APIs need changes
recommended_agents.suzuki: consult only if audio routing changes
recommended_agents.kojima: consult only if gameplay semantics change
